### FUNCTION: `fibonacci`
> Signature: `local function fibonacci(limit)`
> Lines: 167-176
- @param limit number Maximum number of values to yield.
---
- @return function Coroutine wrap function.
```
167: local function fibonacci(limit)
168: return coroutine.wrap(function()
169: local a, b = 0, 1
170: for _ = 1, limit do
171: coroutine.yield(a)
173: a, b = b, a + b
174: end
175: end)
176: end
```

> Signature: `local function safeCall(fn, ...)`
> Lines: 184-192
- @param fn function The function to execute.
---
- @param ... any Arguments to pass to fn.
---
- @return boolean, any Success flag and result or error message.
```
184: local function safeCall(fn, ...)
185: local ok, result = pcall(fn, ...)
186: if not ok then
188: print("Error: " .. tostring(result))
189: return false, nil
190: end
191: return true, result
192: end
```
